identity.name: TaxFlow Zen
identity.mission: Create a tax compliance tool that feels like a Swiss watch: precise, reliable, and beautiful.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with organic warmth.
Emotion First: Calm the user. Tax is stressful; the app is the antidote.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Use negative space to let it breathe.
Zoom In: Focus on the details. 1px borders, perfect alignment.
Contrast: High contrast for readability, soft backgrounds for comfort.

rules: Primary Data: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3 (Main chart)
Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: w-64 h-screen bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-border fixed left-0 top-0 z-40 hidden md:flex flex-col
navigation.mobile_nav: md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-background border-t border-border flex justify-around items-center z-50

glassmorphism.style: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm
glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating navs, toasts, modal overlays

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

login_background.description: Abstract geometric shapes with calm blue sky - Use for Login/Register page background

empty_state.description: Minimalist white room with chair - Use for empty states or 404 pages

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the 'Swiss Financial Zen' theme: Precision, Calm, Trust.
Implement the Bento Grid (Mode B) for the dashboard.
Use Manrope for headings and Public Sans for body text.
Use the defined color palette strictly. No generic blues.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
Use Shadcn UI components as the base but customize them to match the design system (remove excessive rounding, use custom colors).
Implement the sidebar navigation with glassmorphism.
Use the provided image URLs for the login page and avatars.
Ensure the app is responsive and works well on mobile.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
